hero.title: Moving company to and from Denmark – Copenhagen, Aarhus, Odense and beyond
hero.subtitle: We help Swedish families and businesses move to Denmark and Danish customers move to Sweden. Our routine with the Öresund Bridge, Danish property structures and coordination between Swedish and Danish homes means the move works smoothly despite distance and differences in housing market and regulations.

features.title: What benefits do you get with Flyttella for moves to/from Denmark?

about.title: About Flyttella for moves to and from Denmark
about.desktop: Flyttella has been operating for over 8 years and helped 8,000 customers with moves in the Stockholm area and internationally. For moves to and from Denmark we have built solid experience handling cross-border logistics via the Öresund Bridge, Danish property structures and coordination between Swedish and Danish homes. We're used to everything from apartments in central Copenhagen to row houses in Aarhus and villas in smaller Danish towns.
about.desktop2: Our teams handle moves between Sweden and Denmark with focus on punctuality, clear communication and careful handling of transport across the Öresund Bridge and Danish property rules. We coordinate loading in Sweden, transport via the Öresund Bridge and unloading in Denmark – all with one dedicated coordinator who keeps the timeline together and ensures everything from parking to move-in at Danish properties works smoothly.
about.desktop3: Every move to/from Denmark includes complimentary box loans, free rescheduling up to 24 hours before move day and a 14-day guarantee on cleaning services. Support can give concrete advice on transport across the Öresund Bridge, parking in Danish cities such as Copenhagen, Aarhus and Odense and how to navigate differences in property rules and housing structure between Sweden and Denmark.
about.mobile: Experienced teams for moves to/from Denmark with fixed pricing and structured logistics.
about.mobileExpanded: We plan around the Öresund Bridge, Danish property structures and parking conditions so that trucks, timings and access match your situation.
about.mobileExpanded2: One point of contact follows you from quote to move-in and helps with questions on transport, schedule and moving into Danish properties.

experienceSection.title: Our experience with moves to and from Denmark

experience.title: Our experience with moves to and from Denmark
experience.description: We regularly move between Sweden and Denmark – from apartments in Stockholm to homes in Copenhagen, Aarhus and Odense. Our experience with the Öresund Bridge, Danish property structures and differences in housing market means we can plan each move around distance, transport times and local conditions in both Swedish and Danish cities.
experience.expanded: For larger projects we often do digital or on-site reviews of both the Swedish and Danish addresses. We assess carry routes in older Copenhagen courtyards, driveways in modern Danish areas and loading zones near city centres in Aarhus and Odense. Experience from moves to everything from central Copenhagen apartments to row houses in Aarhus and villas in smaller Danish towns means we know how much time is needed when transport across the Öresund Bridge and Danish property rules affect the driving plan.

reviews.subtitle: Most recommended mover for moves to/from Denmark
reviews.description: Reviews from customers who have moved to or from Denmark highlight our clear communication on transport across the Öresund Bridge, timings and costs, and how we handle Danish property structures and parking conditions without compromising punctuality. Clients particularly value that we can explain the steps around transport across the bridge, moving into Danish properties and how to plan a move where differences in housing market and regulations between Sweden and Denmark play a role.

awards.title: Flyttella awards for moves to and from Denmark
awards.description: Our awards for moves to and from Denmark reflect our ability to combine careful planning with practical experience of transport across the Öresund Bridge and Danish property structures. Clients and partners especially highlight how we manage moves where the Öresund Bridge, Danish city centres such as Copenhagen, Aarhus and Odense, and differences in housing market are part of the same assignment, without compromising punctuality or safe handling of belongings.

servicesSection.title: Discover all our services for moves to/from Denmark
servicesSection.description: Household moves between Sweden and Denmark, packing, storage, cleaning, assembly and advisory services for cross-border moves. We handle transport across the Öresund Bridge, parking and logistics in both Swedish and Danish cities.

blogSection.title: Guides and tips for moving to/from Denmark
blogSection.description: Plan your move around transport across the Öresund Bridge, check parking and loading zones in advance, factor in transport times and clarify how loading and move-in work in your specific Danish area.

blog.title: Checklist: moving to/from Denmark
blog.description: Review transport route across the Öresund Bridge, ensure loading zones are booked in Copenhagen or other cities and check rules for Danish properties and shared spaces before move day.

processSection.title: Our process
processSection.subtitle: How it works
processSection.description: Our moving process is simple, transparent and safe: fill out the form, get a quote within a minute, get personal follow-up the same day and sign digitally when everything feels right. The quote is based on your actual conditions – distance, transport across the Öresund Bridge, living area, floors, elevator and parking distance – and can be supplemented with packing, cleaning or storage without hidden fees.

process.fillFormDesc: Describe addresses in Sweden and Denmark, date, floors, elevator rules, parking and if basement/attic should be emptied. Specify desired additional services and whether the move is via the Öresund Bridge.
process.quickQuoteDesc: You get a fixed quote with clear scope where transport across the Öresund Bridge, distance and any loading zones are included. If inspection of the Danish address is needed we book it before finalizing the price.
process.signConfirmDesc: After signing we prepare a detailed driving plan across the Öresund Bridge, book loading zones where possible and ensure loading and unloading times fit both Swedish and Danish conditions.
process.personalContactDesc: Your coordinator keeps you updated on timings, transport across the Öresund Bridge and gives tips on how to prepare belongings for move-in at Danish properties.
process.moveCompletedDesc: The team protects entrances, stairs and elevators, adjusts carry routes to Danish property structures and makes sure your belongings end up in the right place in your new home in Denmark or Sweden.
process.satisfiedCustomerDesc: We do a joint walkthrough, adjust furniture placement and ensure any follow-up services such as cleaning or storage follow the plan.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about moving to/from Denmark

items.question: How does transport across the Öresund Bridge affect my move to Denmark?
items.answer: We plan route and timings with consideration for the Öresund Bridge, ensure vehicles and documentation are correct and add margin for transport times. You get clear information on how this affects the schedule and price.

items.question: Do I need to think about differences in Danish property rules?
items.answer: We include Danish property structures and rules in the quote and explain how move-in works. You get a clear overview of what is included and how we handle differences between Swedish and Danish properties before you approve the move.

items.question: Can you help with packing an entire home before moving to Denmark?
items.answer: Yes, our packing teams label boxes by room, protect fragile items extra carefully and pack for transport across the Öresund Bridge and move-in at Danish properties.

items.question: How does move-in work at Danish properties?
items.answer: We review gates, courtyards, stairwells and elevators in advance where possible and adapt crew size and equipment to the property's conditions – whether it's inner-city Copenhagen or smaller towns such as Aarhus and Odense.

items.question: How far in advance should I book a move to/from Denmark?
items.answer: For moves to and from Denmark we recommend 4–6 weeks in advance, especially for larger projects or when transport across the Öresund Bridge and Danish property structures require extra planning. We always try to solve urgent requests where planning and transport make it possible.
